query:
SELECT 
  r.userId,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  r.weekKey,
  r.decision,
  r.rescueAttempted,
  LEFT(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.blockers, '$[0].criterion')), 80) AS firstBlocker,
  JSON_LENGTH(r.blockers) AS blockerCount,
  LEFT(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.top3Snapshot, '$[0].name')), 60) AS topProject
FROM repDigestGateResults r
JOIN users u ON u.id = r.userId
ORDER BY r.weekKey DESC, u.name ASC
LIMIT 15;

ORDER BY r.weekKey DESC, u.name ASC
LIMIT 15;
